est_vehicle_hours_saved_DROPPED: NOT REPORTED - score-to-vehicle mapping is unestablished; see note
headline_metric: 37.0% reduction in priority-weighted delay vs operationally realistic baseline

verification.bsl_policy: nearest available unit to newest incident (no priority awareness)

assumptions: Travel time = Haversine distance / 20.0 km/h (no routing API - deployment hook only)
Clearance duration = actual clearance_time_minutes if known, else 48.5 min median from Phase 1b
Baseline = nearest available unit to newest incident (operationally realistic, not random)
Priority-weighted delay = sum(priority_score x STEP_MINUTES) for unhandled active incidents per step
Vehicle-hours conversion DROPPED: priority score is dimensionless (0-10), not a vehicle count; 1 score-point != 1 vehicle/min
Defensible headline: 37% PW-delay reduction. Stated as relative improvement only.
